data.Description (en): Acala is the decentralized finance hub of Polkadot. It is a scalable, Ethereum-compatible layer-1 smart contract platform optimized for DeFi. Acala offers a suite of financial primitives including a multi-collateralized stablecoin backed by cross-chain assets (aUSD), a trustless staking derivative (Liquid DOT), and an AMM DEX.
data.Description (zh): Acala 是 Polkadot 的去中心化金融中心，是一个可扩展的、与以太坊兼容的、为 DeFi 优化的第一层智能合约平台。该平台提供了一套金融原语，包括由跨链资产支持的多抵押稳定币（aUSD）、无需信任的质押衍生品（Liquid DOT）和 AMM DEX。
